targets.expr:
* | _msg:="claude_code.api_request" AND model:$model AND department:$department AND team.id:$team AND user.email:$user AND service.name:$service_name
  | stats avg(cost_usd) cost_usd

panels.title: Average API call cost over time

targets.expr:
* | _msg:="claude_code.api_request" AND department:$department AND model:$model AND team.id:$team AND user.email:$user AND service.name:$service_name
  | math cost_usd / (input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_creation_tokens + cache_read_tokens) * 1000000 as m_token_cost
  | stats by (model) avg(m_token_cost)

panels.title: Average million of tokens cost over time per model

targets.expr:
* | _msg:="claude_code.api_request"AND department:$department AND model:$model AND team.id:$team AND user.email:$user AND service.name:$service_name
  | math cost_usd / (input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_creation_tokens + cache_read_tokens) * 1000000 as m_token_cost
  | stats avg(m_token_cost)

panels.title: Average million of tokens cost over time
Lines of code: added vs removed

targets.expr:
* | _msg:="claude_code.user_prompt" AND department:$department AND team.id:$team AND user.email:$user AND service.name:$service_name
  | stats avg(prompt_length)

* | _msg:="claude_code.tool_result" AND department:$department AND team.id:$team AND user.email:$user AND service.name:$service_name
  | stats by (tool_name) count() call_count 
  | sort by (call_count desc)

* | _msg:="claude_code.tool_result" AND department:$department AND team.id:$team AND user.email:$user AND service.name:$service_name
  | stats by (tool_name) sum(duration_ms) duration_ms
  | sort by (duration_ms desc)

* | _msg:="claude_code.tool_result" AND department:$department AND team.id:$team AND user.email:$user AND service.name:$service_name
  | format if (success:=false) "failure" as result 
  | format if (success:=true) "success" as result 
  | stats by (result) count() call_count

panels.title: Tool results over time: Success vs failure
Tool decisions over time: accept vs reject

targets.expr:
* | _msg:="claude_code.tool_result" AND department:$department AND team.id:$team AND user.email:$user AND service.name:$service_name
  | stats avg(duration_ms) duration_ms

panels.title: Average tool execution duration over time

targets.expr:
* | _msg:="claude_code.tool_result" AND department:$department AND team.id:$team AND user.email:$user AND service.name:$service_name
  | error:*
  | stats by (tool_name) rate() error_count

* | _msg:="claude_code.api_request" AND model:$model AND department:$department AND team.id:$team AND user.email:$user AND service.name:$service_name
  | stats avg(duration_ms) duration_ms

panels.title: Average API call duration over time

targets.expr:
* | _msg:="claude_code.api_error" AND model:$model AND department:$department AND team.id:$team AND user.email:$user AND service.name:$service_name
  | stats rate()

* | _msg:="claude_code.api_error" AND model:$model AND department:$department AND team.id:$team AND user.email:$user AND service.name:$service_name
  | sort by (_time desc)
  | limit 100
  | fields _time, error, model, department, team.id, user.email, attempt, status_code, duration_ms

* | _msg:="claude_code.tool_result" AND department:$department AND team.id:$team AND user.email:$user AND service.name:$service_name
  | error:*
  | sort by (_time desc)
  | limit 100
  | fields _time, error, department, team.id, user.email, duration_ms, tool_name, tool_parameters
department:$department AND team.id:$team AND user.email:$user AND service.name:$service_name

title: Claude Code (VictoriaStack)
description: Dashboard for Claude Code CLI with information about cost, token usage, tools usage stats and latency, added/removed lines of code, API requests and errors, created commits and PRs, etc...
